last_mile_review.skip_reason: Last-mile two-stage adversarial review skipped on user directive (2026-05-04). Environment lacks node binary required by ollama-companion.mjs and codex-companion.mjs; user authorized 'assume node will be available, proceed.' All 18 pre-impl + 18 post-impl verification questions PASS, make check green at 86.00% coverage (lima.py 94%, cli.py 86%), AC-012/013/014/015/016/017/018 traceability sound.

summary: Refactored LimaVM.shell() into a typed dispatcher (LaunchSpec + _build_launch_spec) and added the --harness CLI override flag. opencode launches without --dangerously-* regardless of claude_dangerously_skip_permissions per FR7/AC-018. Per-invocation override does not mutate .clauded.yaml. The mode-flag interaction matrix is honoured: --harness is silently ignored with --reprovision/--detect/--stop/--destroy/--reboot/--force-stop, and warned (one line) with --edit. Boy-scout: USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0 is removed entirely from the launch command for all harnesses.

changes: Added @dataclass(frozen=True) LaunchSpec(argv: list[str], env: dict[str, str] = field(default_factory=dict)) at module level.
Added pure module-level dispatcher _build_launch_spec(harness, config) -> LaunchSpec with three branches plus a defence-in-depth ValueError on unknown harness.
LimaVM.__init__ signature now: (self, config, *, harness_override=None) -> None. Stores self.harness_override.

LimaVM.shell() body replaced the hardcoded `claude_cmd` block + USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0 prefix with `harness = self.harness_override or self.config.harness; spec = _build_launch_spec(harness, self.config); full_cmd = ' '.join(...)`.
USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0 removed entirely (boy-scout per architecture.md §3 rule 7).
Imported HARNESS_NAMES from clauded.config.
Added private helper _validate_harness_override(harness, config) — exits 1 with 'clauded --edit' message when harness=='opencode' and 'opencode' not in frameworks.
Added @click.option('--harness', type=click.Choice(list(HARNESS_NAMES)), default=None) to main().
Added `harness: str | None = None` to main() signature.
Plumbed harness_override=harness through all 5 LimaVM(config) construction sites (--destroy, --stop/--force-stop, --edit (initial vm + post-update vm), default launch path).
Added one-line warning at top of --edit branch when --harness flag is set.

Added validation gate `if not (reprovision or reboot): _validate_harness_override(harness, config)` before the default-launch LimaVM construction (after early-return mode handlers and after Config.load).
Updated import to bring in LaunchSpec, _build_launch_spec, dataclasses.

Updated two pre-existing assertions (test_shell_calls_limactl_shell_with_claude, test_shell_without_skip_permissions) to drop the 'USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0 ' prefix from the asserted bash-lic command string.
Added _make_config helper for dispatcher tests.
Added TestLaunchSpec (1 frozen-instance test).
Added TestBuildLaunchSpec (8 tests: 6 per-harness branches + parametrized RIPGREP-absent + unknown-harness raises).

Added TestLimaVMShellHarnessDispatch (7 integration tests covering AC-016/017/018 via LimaVM.shell + harness_override precedence + RIPGREP-absent in assembled bash-lic command + default override-None fallback).
Added two harness-config-yaml fixtures (with and without opencode in frameworks).
Added TestHarnessFlagOverride (AC-012).
Added TestHarnessFlagInvalidValue (AC-013).
Added TestHarnessFlagMissingFramework (AC-014).
Added TestHarnessFlagModeFlagInteractions (AC-015 — 5 sub-tests: --destroy/--stop/--reprovision/--detect silent + --edit warning).
[Unreleased] / Added: --harness CLI flag entry.
[Unreleased] / Changed: VM entrypoint now harness-driven.
[Unreleased] / Removed: USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0 env var prefix.

fields: env: dict[str, str] (always empty after boy-scout removal; field retained for forward compat)
invariants_enforced: INV-1: argv[0] in {'claude', 'codex', 'opencode'} — by construction (one literal per branch).
INV-2: env never contains 'USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP' — by construction (no branch writes that key) AND verified by parametrized test.
INV-3: opencode argv contains no '--dangerously-*' flag regardless of skip — by construction AND verified by skip=true and skip=false tests.

consumed_as: Config.harness as the dispatcher's default input

tests_modified.change: dropped 'USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0 ' prefix from asserted bash-lic command string
dropped 'USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0 ' prefix from asserted bash-lic command string

make_check_result.mypy: Success: no issues found in 22 source files

pytest.delta_vs_baseline: +36 new (+ 2 modified) vs Story 04 baseline of 999

boundary_rules_check: Rule 1: satisfied — cli.py imports HARNESS_NAMES from the public clauded.config surface; LaunchSpec lives only on lima.py.
Rule 2: satisfied — override is per-instance; .clauded.yaml is never mutated by --harness; AC-012 explicitly verified.
Rule 4: satisfied — dispatcher logic is functionally required by AC-016/017/018; no test-only adaptations.
Rule 5: the launch dispatcher IS the fragile seam; this story consolidates it.
Rule 7: USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0 EXPLICITLY REMOVED in this story (architecture.md §3 rule 7); verified by parametrized RIPGREP-absent test.
implementation_constraints_check: FR9: claude-code and codex still consult claude_dangerously_skip_permissions; opencode ignores it (AC-018).

Backward compatibility: Config-without-harness defaults to claude-code; existing callers of LimaVM(config) work unchanged (keyword-only override defaults to None). USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0 removal is the one observable change, explicitly authorized by architecture.md §3 rule 7.
Each story leaves codebase green: make check exit 0.
out_of_scope_confirmed_excluded: Opencode mount blocks in lima.py _generate_lima_config (Story 05 — premature diff present in working tree but NOT touched by Story 04).
notes_for_verifier: Implementation strictly follows architecture.md §4 LaunchSpec contract and architecture.json. All 1035 tests green; lint and typecheck clean. Coverage 86%. CHANGELOG entry sized for Story 04's contribution (Story 06 will consolidate). Verifier-relevant pointers: src/clauded/lima.py:18 (LaunchSpec dataclass), src/clauded/lima.py:38 (_build_launch_spec dispatcher), src/clauded/lima.py:130 (LimaVM.__init__ harness_override param), src/clauded/lima.py:285-291 (LimaVM.shell dispatcher invocation), src/clauded/cli.py:27-46 (_validate_harness_override), src/clauded/cli.py:626-633 (--harness Click option), src/clauded/cli.py:830-836 (--edit warning), src/clauded/cli.py:921-925 (validation gate), and the 5 LimaVM construction sites at cli.py:788/806/833/858/921 all pass harness_override=harness.
